title: Role memberships
description: Schema for shared/role_memberships.csv. Role memberships map canonical roles onto navigation clusters in shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Memberships are grouping/navigation metadata only and must not encode coverage obligations.

membership_kind.description: How the role participates in the navigation graph. Only cluster_membership is allowed; role-anchor and residual-anchor membership kinds are not part of the canonical ontology.

is_primary.description: True when this is the role's primary navigation cluster membership.
